title: exec: "rootless-cni-infra": executable file not found in $PATH: OCI not found
body:
I follow the reference: [https://github.com/containers/podman/tree/v2.2.1-rhel/contrib/rootless-cni-infra](https://github.com/containers/podman/tree/v2.2.1-rhel/contrib/rootless-cni-infra) to setup my rootless environment. But some error was issued.

$ podman run -d --name web --hostname web --network foo nginx:alpine
Error: exec failed: container_linux.go:370: starting container process caused: exec: "rootless-cni-infra": executable file not found in $PATH: OCI not found

How to fix this issue?

Output of `podman version`:
```
Version:      2.2.1
API Version:  2
Go Version:   go1.14.7
Built:        Tue Feb  9 05:19:06 2021
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

Output of `podman info --debug`:

comments.body:
Having the same issue. Definitely a podman noob so I feel Im missing something!

```bash
$ podman run --detach \
  --env MYSQL_DATABASE=nextcloud \
  --env MYSQL_USER=nextcloud \
  --env MYSQL_PASSWORD=XXX \ 
  --env MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=XXX \ 
  --volume nextcloud-db:/var/lib/mysql \
  --network nextcloud-net \
  --restart on-failure \
  --name nextcloud-db \
  docker.io/library/mariadb:10

Error: rootless CNI infra image not present - please build image from https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v2.2.1-rhel/contrib/rootless-cni-infra/ and tag as "rootless-cni-infra"
```
```bash
# succesfully built rootless-cni-infra container
$ podman ps -a
CONTAINER ID  IMAGE                                                COMMAND               CREATED         STATUS                  PORTS                     NAMES
2d397339255f  rootless-cni-infra                                   sleep infinity        11 minutes ago  Up 11 minutes ago                           rootless-cni-infra
```
```bash
$ podman start nextcloud-db
Error: unable to start container "32ba10b41e5351318df026c7b09502cbe5294749d1be57e0380b7d3977e31342": exec failed: container_linux.go:370: starting container process caused: exec: "rootless-cni-infra": executable file not found in $PATH: OCI not found
```

Go Version:   go1.14.12

OS/Arch:      linux/amd64

Can you provide the exact commands you are using to build the rootless infra image?

Even I'm seeing this issue, but I somehow fixed it.

I got the files from here https://github.com/containers/podman/tree/v2.2.1/contrib/rootless-cni-infra
```
cni-infra]$ ls
Containerfile  rootless-cni-infra
```

podman build --tag rootless-cni-infra --file Containerfile

I was wondering what went wrong, but I still don't know exactly, I'm guessing its the versions, I was using the latest files rather than following the podman version
```
< ARG DNSNAME_VESION=v1.0.0
---
> ARG DNSNAME_VERSION=v1.1.1
36c36
< ENV ROOTLESS_CNI_INFRA_VERSION=3
---
> ENV ROOTLESS_CNI_INFRA_VERSION=5

```
1. Make sure that you chmod 755 rootless-cni-infra
2. If you have any existing networks and they don't work then remove and add them again
3. Try using the version as per podman version for both the files.

I realize that these are the basics but anyone who stumbles upon this, I hope this helps.
